title: PvP mods with optimization
description: A lightweight PvP-focused Fabric modpack that enhances combat performance, reduces lag, and improves visuals. Perfect for smooth multiplayer duels and crystal PvP.
body:
PvP Mods with Optimization
Next-Gen Performance for the Competitive Edge
PvP Mods with Optimization is a precision-engineered Fabric modpack built for high-stakes combat. By fine-tuning the modern rendering pipeline and leveraging advanced garbage collection, this pack delivers unrivaled frame stability, lower input latency, and a cleaner visual field—essential for duels, crystal PvP, and high-tier competitive play.

### ⚠️ CRITICAL: Boot-Up Instructions for Peak FPS
To actually see the "Next-Gen" performance, you must use these JVM arguments in your launcher. This enables the ZGC Generational collector, which basically deletes lag spikes before they happen.

> Copy and paste this into your Java/JVM Settings:

```
-XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+UseNUMA -XX:AllocateHeapAt=.
```
![ZGC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7c501d726872c86e8bebeb6de2907ae086cba2.png)

> 🛠️ Step-by-Step Optimization Guide
> Don't just install the pack and pray. Follow these steps to ensure the engine is actually running right:
> 
> Open your Launcher: (Modrinth App, Prism, or MultiMC).
> 
> Go to Instance Settings: Right-click the PvP Mods with Optimization instance and select Edit or Settings.
> 
> Find JVM Arguments: Look for the text box labeled JVM Arguments or Java Flags.
> 
> Paste the String: Delete everything currently in that box and paste the code provided above.
> 
> Memory Check: Make sure you have 4GB to 6GB of RAM allocated. ZGC works best when it has a little breathing room.
> 
> Launch: You’re ready to dominate.

### 🚀 The Performance Core
The Optimization Stack: Deep integration with Lithium and FerriteCore to minimize memory overhead and server-to-client "ghost" lag.

Zero Stutter: Specifically engineered to eliminate micro-stutters during intense, high-particle combat scenarios.

Modern Pipeline: Clean, stable frame pacing that stays consistent even when the screen is full of crystals and explosions.

⚔️ Tactical Intelligence
Combat Analytics: Real-time tracking with Health Indicators, TotemCounter, and Sprint Indicators.

Precision Hitboxes: Enhanced Combat Hitboxes to ensure every swing or crystal placement lands with frame-perfect accuracy.

🎨 High-Fidelity Visuals
Sleek Aesthetics: Professional-grade visuals using Iris Shaders, Blur+, and Wavey Capes.

Clarity First: Chat Heads and UI cleanups ensure your screen stays uncluttered while keeping you informed.

🛠️ Pro-Grade Utilities
Seamless Control: Includes Zoomify, Freelook, and an In-Game Account Switcher for rapid profile swapping and tactical awareness.

Easy Management: Full Mod Menu integration for on-the-fly adjustments.

⚙️ Technical Stack
Game Version: 1.21.1 → Latest

Modloader: Fabric (Current Stable)

Type: 100% Client-Side (Vanilla Friendly)

Hardware Req: 4GB+ RAM Recommended

💡 Developer Notes
Maximum Compatibility: Designed for any multiplayer environment. No server-side mods required.

Stability Warning: To maintain the integrity of the performance stack, avoid adding mods that modify core combat physics or outdated rendering hooks.

### Legacy Support: This pack is optimized for 1.21.1+. If you are running older versions (1.16.5 - 1.21), switch to my Hyper Optimized pack for peak performance on legacy engines.[Click here](https://modrinth.com/project/p9tlAYha) to download
